title: Sound Basket
description: A first-sound sorting game where kids place picture cards into letter baskets.
learningGoals: Isolate the first sound in a spoken word
Connect initial sounds to familiar letter baskets
Build phonemic awareness with picture-first play
interactionModel: sort-into-bins drag or tap-tap picture cards into first-sound letter baskets
feedbackModel: Correct sorts get pop and sparkle SFX plus spoken praise; misses wiggle gently with a spoken nudge and retry.

modes.title: Two Baskets
modes.skill: initial-sound isolation with two contrasting onsets

modes.title: Three Baskets
modes.skill: initial-sound isolation with three contrasting onsets

credits: Kaigani; shared QLOBE Kids object and letter-tile art only (see ASSETS.md). Built with Codex for QLOBE Kids.
